knowing the sun was coming in, I remember every detail. Now that I'm 44, I remember every detail

Thank you.
Jason Vick. I live in St. Paul, Minnesota. I'm 44 years old. I'm a backpacker, outdoorsman. I love
the outdoors. I have many hobbies that are connected to my careers. And my very first
encounter was back when I was about four years old. I was living in a small apartment in the
projects with my mother. I was a very little child. So I decided that night that I was nervous
and I was going to spend the night in my mother's bed. But I was laying there. I had gone to sleep.
And for me, I had felt that I had woken up in the morning. And I'm guessing it was morning because
the sunlight was starting to come in. I could tell that it wasn't very cloudy. I mean, it was so
surreal because the sun was coming in. It was like I could tell every detail in the room.
And I was laying on the left side. And this is where it gets really strange. Laying there,
knowing the sun was coming in, I remember every detail. Now that I'm 44, I remember every detail
as if it was yesterday. And that's why it feels so very real for me. Laying there,
I looked over my left arm and I saw this, what I could only imagine it to be was, and this is where it gets crazy, is like a, oh my gosh, it's so hard to say, like a demonic wolf.
And it came out from underneath the bed.
And I remember its face.
It was brown.
It was complete full of hair.
as if you were looking at a dog, but with a very demonic demeanor. The eyes were yellow,
the nose was black, and all it had was kind of a, oh, what would you say, kind of a snarl,
very white, jagged teeth. And it just, it was very brief. It reached over and it scraped my left arm.
And that's where it gets really strange because for a, I would say, oh gosh, a few weeks, I actually had a scratch on my left arm.
And I remember every detail as if it was yesterday.
This demonic dog-like creature is coming over the left side of the bed, and it just wants to scratch my arm.
And the sun's coming in, my mom is asleep, and that's where it ends.
it disappears. It goes into just complete nothing. And I have no other memory of that morning
besides that. But being 44 and looking back and seeing myself as a four-year-old child,
it's one of the very first memories I've ever had. I don't have a lot of memories as a child
because I grew up in a very, very abusive and horrible childhood. But the crazy part is that
I can remember that day, that morning, as if it was yesterday, now that I'm 44, remembering for a
four-year-old child. And that is what is absolutely astonishing for me. So that was my very first
dog-man encounter. Was it flesh and blood? Was it completely spiritual? Well, just imagine, I mean,

it comes over the bed it disappears So you know you be the judge as far as to you know Was it paranormal Was it supernatural Was it preternatural Was it demonic I can tell you right now that I was absolutely afraid
I was terrified.
Being a four-year-old kid seeing these type of things, it was absolutely a nightmare.
It was my very first experience, but it was an absolute nightmare.
And to this day, remembering all the details tells me that it was something that was completely
substantial, something that was completely real.
and there's just, I wouldn't know how to discredit it as far as my very first experience.
Now going into my second experience, now that I'm living in a certain apartment here that I lived in
for almost 10 years here in St. Paul, Minnesota, I had two dogs, Gabriel and Kajia. They have passed
away as about two and a half years ago. This encounter happened, I would say it's 2023.
So I'm guessing that this encounter happened back in, oh gosh, I think it was like 2019,
something like that. I had two boys, two boy pit bulls, like I said, Gabriel and Kajia,
very big pit bulls. They were 110 pounds a piece, big boys, but they were also my medical service
dogs. I had trained them and I made them my medical service dogs. And that's the reason why
they can live with me in my apartment. Anyways, my boy Gabriel was the biggest of them. He was 110.
Kaija was 98 pounds, but he was a big boy, but he was also a very sensitive boy. And I will get in
later in our talk about paranormal experiences, but he could always tell when something almost
paranormal was happening. He would react in a certain way that we'll get into later.
but I was taking my boys to go potty. So basically I had to, you know, go out my door,
take the elevator down and go out the back of the building. So we took the elevator down,
we're going out to the back of the building. Now it was nighttime. It was very dark outside.
I live right next to a major highway, which is literally a stone's throw away. I'm guessing
about the entrance ramp for the highways about gosh, from where we were, I'd say about maybe
70, 80 feet away. And it goes right on down. It's a right-hand entrance. And then it goes
onto Highway 94, which runs right through Minnesota. And it was dark out, but there

We're facing that direction. And my boy Gabriel turns to the right and I'm like, let's go potty.
Come on, you know, hey, let's go to the bathroom. Come on, let's go, guys. But he wouldn't move.
I was jerking the leash and I noticed he's not moving. Now, my boy Kaiser is kind of just
meandering about on the leash. I had extender leashes, which allowed the dog to go up to 13 feet.
but Gabriel was locked looking to our right. So he's looking west and basically it's a large yard,
no fences or anything like that, but it's just a large yard next to the building.
And if you look about 80, 90 yards in that direction, you're just going to come into some

So it doesn't look like a yard that's completely lit up. Now there are lights,
Part of the yard is lit up, but that part of the yard is dark because there are no lights at the very end of that part of the yard.
Just a fence and some houses.
I look over in that direction, and Gabe went into his pit bull stance, chest out, legs centered, just ready to take on whatever is going on in that direction.
I look downward, and I see this black shape.
Now, to kind of give you some kind of idea of what this black shape looked like, this is where it gets difficult.
Because the second I saw it, it took off.
It moved with preternatural speed, a speed that you just, you can't attribute to anything that's natural
or to anything that you could associate with as far as animals in our animal kingdom or a bird or anything.
And to give you an idea of that shape, here on Vic's channel, the opening credits, there's that picture of that werewolf with the muscular body, the muscular legs.
You know, you got that long thigh leg going into the bottom part of the leg.
And what I saw was whatever it was, what was a solid black shape.
But the blackness literally looked like I was looking into a black void.

I saw no details I saw no fur I didn see any details whatsoever except for like a black void and then the overall shape And what I would say you know what we think about when we think about werewolves like from the movie Underworld just the long legs the muscular body But now seeing
it as a black shape, I saw it go from left to right and it took off with speed I can't even
imagine. It was so quick, but it left an impression in my mind that I can't forget. I just saw the

I need to protect my owner, Jason.
I need to protect all of us.
And he would just look in that direction and just want to completely protect us.
He wanted to completely just get in between whatever was in that direction and us.
And most days, you know, we'd go potty and we'd go about our business back there.
But there would be times where he would just lock into position, eyes locked in that direction.
And he just wouldn't move until after several minutes of just urging him to go.
So that was my second encounter.
My third encounter, leading up to four here.
My third encounter, it was, again, at night.
I was with my best friend.
